arts.ttl: Barcelona, Juventus & Co - which top-5 league teams have won their main cup competition most?
arts.sum: With the business end of the season in the top leagues and the Champions League upon us, the main domestic cups in Europe's top-five leagues are also beginning to heat up....

arts.ttl: Arsenal step up pursuit of LaLiga goalkeeper as Gunners look to beat Barcelona to signing of £13million star
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Atletico , Leverkusen and Barcelona have all expressed interest in the 23-year old but he has is willing to accept the challenge of competing for the number one slot.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: It's all to play for in Wednesday's Copa del Rey semi-final, as Atletico Madrid host the second leg against Barcelona. Atletico predicted lineup vs Barcelona (4-4-2) : Musso; Llorente, Gimenez, Lenglet, Reinildo; Simeone, Barrios, De Paul, Lino; Alvarez, Griezmann.

The German is on the verge of his second final of this season, but to achieve it, he will have to win the second leg of the Copa del Rey semifinal against Atlético de Madrid at the Metropolitano. The Barça coach assessed the duo's physical condition ahead of the Copa del Rey semi-final second leg against Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona rocked by fresh La Liga accusations over Fair Play & Dani Olmo's registration
arts.sum: La Liga have lowered Barcelona's salary cap amid concerns over the €100m sale of VIP seats in the new Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'battling' Barcelona for La Liga star as £16.7m offer 'is prepared'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City allegedly join Barcelona in the race for Rayo Vallecano's Andrei Ratiu during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Yamal is on another planet when it comes to one particular stat
arts.sum: Most successful dribbles across Europe's top 5 leagues this season: The teenager caught the eye with his brilliant ability on the ball as he took his tally to successful dribbles this season to an impressive 114.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Andrey Santos, Jules Kounde, Pedri
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: How to Watch Atletico Madrid vs. Barcelona: Copa del Rey Semifinals
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid host Barcelona for their fourth meeting of the season in the second leg of the Copa Del Rey semifinals.

arts.ttl: Rakitic reveals what Xavi first told him about Yamal
arts.sum: “I remember that when I spoke to Xavi about him for the first time, he said to me: ‘Ivan he is so intelligent that he knows when to stop an attack, when he has to come back, when he has to go around again...’ and that’s not easy. The former Barcelona midfielder also revealed what Xavi once told him about Yamal when the forward was still coming through the ranks at the club.
